zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertha de Picquigny於1054年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆皮易尼時，她的父親Comte Eustache de Picquigny14歲，母親Adele de Ponthieu19歲。她和Judhael de Totnes至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1145年在英國戴文巴恩斯塔普爾享年91歲，埋葬在英國戴文巴恩斯塔普爾 聖 瑪麗 抹大拉的。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bertha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of a Continental Germanic name, a short form of various compound women's personal names derived from berht ‘famous’ (akin to Modern English bright). It probably existed in England before the Conquest, and was certainly reinforced by Norman use, but fell out of use in the 15th century. It was reintroduced into the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century, but has once again gone out of fashion.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertha de Picquigny was born in 1054, in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Comte Eustache de Picquigny, was 14 and her mother, Adele de Ponthieu, was 19. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Judhael de Totnes. She died in 1145, in Barnstaple, Devon, England, at the age of 91, and was buried in Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertha de Picquigny est née en 1054, à Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Comte Eustache de Picquigny, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Adele de Ponthieu, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Judhael de Totnes. Elle est décédée en 1145, à Barnstaple, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, Angleterre.

de.St Peter & St Mary Magdalene, Barnstaple: Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Bertha de Picquigny 1054 in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Comte Eustache de Picquigny 14 und ihre Mutter Adele de Ponthieu 19. Sie hatte mit Judhael de Totnes mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1145 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Barnstaple, Devon, England und wurde in Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha de Picquigny è nata il nel 1054 nel Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Comte Eustache de Picquigny, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Adele de Ponthieu, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Judhael de Totnes. Morì nel 1145, nel Barnstaple, Devon, England, all'età di 91 anni, e fu sepolta a Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertha de Picquignyが1054年にフランスピカーディソンメピククイグニーで生まれた時，父Comte Eustache de Picquignyは14歳，母Adele de Ponthieuは19歳であった。彼女はJudhael de Totnesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1145年にイギリスデボンバーンスタプルで91歳で死去し，イギリスデボンバーンスタプル スト マリー マグダリーンにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter & St Mary Magdalene, Barnstaple: 영국 데폰 바른스타플 스트 메리 막달레나
ko.lifeSummary: Bertha de Picquigny(이)가 1054년 프랑스 피카디 솜 피c키그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Comte Eustache de Picquigny(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adele de Ponthieu(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Judhael de Totnes(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1145년 영국 데폰 바른스타플에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 바른스타플 스트 메리 막달레나에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Judhael de Totnes. Ela faleceu em 1145, em Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, com 91 anos, e foi sepultada em Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.St Peter & St Mary Magdalene, Barnstaple: барнстапл ст мэри магдеилин, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertha de Picquigny родилась в 1054 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Comte Eustache de Picquigny было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Adele de Ponthieu, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Judhael de Totnes. Она умерла в 1145 г. в местности барнстапл, девон, Англия в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности барнстапл ст мэри магдеилин, девон, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Judhael de Totnes. Murió en 1145, en Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultada en Barnstaple St Mary Magdalene, Devon, Inglaterra.
